name: Edge Studio
description: Edge Studio is an AEO (Answer Engine Optimisation) agency and AI visibility tools company. We help ecommerce brands, DTC founders, service businesses, and natural health practitioners get recommended by AI tools like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews.
slogan: AEO Agency for the AI Search Era

founder.name: Marina
founder.description: Marina is the founder of Edge Studio. She has 10 plus years of experience in content strategy, digital marketing, and brand positioning, combined with deep expertise in AI visibility, automation, and structured data. She is also a qualified herbalist with specialist experience in the natural health and wellness industry.

itemOffered.name: Found By AI
itemOffered.description: An automated AI visibility audit tool. Found By AI runs 20 purchase-intent prompts across major AI platforms including ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. It scores brand visibility out of 20 and generates 6 content assets to improve AI visibility. Results are delivered by email in under 60 seconds. Works for both product brands and service businesses.

itemOffered.name: AEO Agency Services
itemOffered.description: Done-for-you Answer Engine Optimisation strategy and implementation. Services include AI visibility audits, AEO content strategy, Answer Hub development, schema and structured data implementation, brand entity optimisation, and monthly AEO monitoring and reporting.

itemOffered.name: Sage
itemOffered.description: A 24/7 AI-powered patient guidance chatbot for clinics and natural health practitioners. Currently in development.

brand.name: Edge Studio
brand.description: Edge Studio is a specialist AEO agency and AI visibility tools company. The brand is known for the Found By AI audit tool and done-for-you AEO services for ecommerce and wellness brands.
